title: "Error: /sbin/slirp4netns failed" when trying to create container
body:
### Issue Description

When I try to start a container I get this error:
```sh
Error: /sbin/slirp4netns failed: "open(\"/dev/net/tun\"): No such device\nWARNING: Support for seccomp is experimental\nWARNING: Support for IPv6 is experimental\nchild failed(1)\nWARNING: Support for seccomp is experimental\nWARNING: Support for IPv6 is experimental\n"
```

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Run container with
```sh
podman run hello-world
```


### Describe the results you received

```sh
Error: /sbin/slirp4netns failed: "open(\"/dev/net/tun\"): No such device\nWARNING: Support for seccomp is experimental\nWARNING: Support for IPv6 is experimental\nchild failed(1)\nWARNING: Support for seccomp is experimental\nWARNING: Support for IPv6 is experimental\n"
```

### Describe the results you expected

I expected the container to start.
